subject: Company Law
module: Incorporation, Company Types and the Statutory Contract

lessons.title: What is Company Law? The Nature of a Company
lessons.description: What actually is a company? At its core, a company is a legal entity — a legal person — that is distinct from the individuals who form it.

lessons.title: Advantages and Disadvantages of Incorporation
lessons.description: In our last lesson, we established that a company is a separate legal person, distinct from its members. In this lesson, we're going to explore why that matters in practice.

lessons.title: Section 31 — The Statutory Contract
lessons.description: Section 31 has appeared on the paper repeatedly — in October 2023, October 2022, March 2022, March 2021, March 2020, and March 2019. If there is one essay question you should be fully prepared to answer, it is this one.

lessons.title: LTDs versus DACs — Key Differences
lessons.description: An LTD — a private company limited by shares — is governed by Part 2 of the Companies Act 2014.
